title: Specification, Documentation, and First Public Milestone

acceptance_criteria.text: SPEC.md is a normative reference with a generated record-type catalog and invariant list (generate_spec.py), checked for freshness in CI
Diataxis docs set exists under a registered docs scope: tutorial, concepts, and how-to guides
OSS hygiene present: CONTRIBUTING, SECURITY, CODE_OF_CONDUCT, issue and PR templates
Community surfaces: ROADMAP, example pointer, runnable demo, Discussions enabled, and >=5 good-first-issue items
Honest versioning: VERSION set to 0.1.0 and a v0.1.0-alpha pre-release published (decisions 0004, 0005)
Validation and tests pass; SPEC.md and the dashboard regenerate cleanly
